demographics.occupation: office/knowledge worker, reports a high-pressure work deadline

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart has been racing non-stop since I woke up, I feel completely exhausted, and my chest feels heavy and uncomfortable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pounding, racing heartbeat has been going for about half a day and won't settle, I'm wiped out and a bit dizzy, and I'm scared something is wrong with my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: woke up with it about 12 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last 12 hours or so
symptom_narrative.character: a fast, pounding heartbeat that I can feel, with a heavy uncomfortable pressure in my chest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really full-on and non-stop; I feel drained and shaky
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my chest — the racing and the heavy pressure feeling
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there the whole time, hasn't come and gone
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I've tried has settled it; resting hasn't fixed it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around the house makes me feel more lightheaded
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: worn out and exhausted, a bit dizzy when I walk around, my hands feel a little shaky, and I feel really anxious and on edge
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this that I can remember
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've had to stop and rest, I can't get on with anything

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: lots of energy drinks over the last couple of days to get through a work deadline

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; under a lot of pressure from a stressful work deadline and has been drinking a lot of energy drinks to keep going
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: has been relying on caffeine/energy drinks over the last 48 hours

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried and restless, keeps returning to a fear that the heart is failing

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch keeps showing my heart rate around 125 to 130
objective_data_offered.timing: on and off through the morning
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wrist-wearable reading, not a clinical monitor and not a rhythm diagnosis

objective_data_offered.value: I counted my own pulse and it felt like well over a hundred, and steady/regular rather than skipping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-count; cannot reliably distinguish rhythm

objective_data_offered.value: when I hold my hands out they look a bit shaky
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video-observed only; not a clinical neurological examination
